summary: CRITICAL ISSUES: (1) matrix.test.ts referenced in workflow (line 26) but not provided—tests will fail. (2) No test fixtures (fixtures/basic.json), act-result.txt, or test harness despite explicit requirements. (3) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (best practice violation). TypeScript code is well-typed and readable, but deliverable is incomplete. Task requires "red/green TDD", "tests runnable with bun test", "all tests run through act", and act-result.txt artifact—none exist. Workflow cannot execute successfully as written.
